questions.statement: The internal energy of gas is the ________.&nbsp;
options: only potential energies of its molecules when the box is at res /
sum of rotational, vibrational and potential energies of its molecules when the box is at rest&nbsp; /
sum of kinetic and potential energies of its molecules when the box is at rest&nbsp; /
sum of translational, rotational and vibrational energies of its molecules when the box is at rest /
